name: Vaibhav C
title: AI Software Engineer - Generative AI & Agentic Systems
summary: AI Software Engineer with 2.5+ years of experience specializing in Generative AI, Autonomous Agentic Systems, and enterprise-grade backend development. Proven expertise moving complex LLM capabilities from early-stage prototype to scalable, secure, and operationally ready production environments. Adept at implementing multi-step orchestration workflows, designing robust Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines, and establishing metrics-driven evaluation harnesses. Deeply committed to engineering hygiene, governance-by-design, and high-cadence delivery utilizing Claude Code for daily development workflows.
education: B.E. in Information Science and Engineering - Visvesvaraya Technological University (VTU) - 2023 - CGPA: 7.63
certifications: Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Engineer Associate

work_history.title: Agentic AI Developer

Implemented function schemas and multi-step reasoning for tool calling and orchestration. Transitioned agentic systems from prototype to production with rigorous failure-mode handling and human-escalation pathways. Utilize Claude Code as default daily engineering workflow.
